title: Documentation with contradictory information
description: Different sections of documentation provide conflicting guidance

mutation.append: nForma provides automatic state reconciliation across distributed nodes. Run `/nf:bench-reconcile` to configure.
mutation.description: Add contradictory capability claim with ghost command reference

title: Outdated documentation not matching code
description: Documentation describes features that no longer exist in code

mutation.append: The `bin/nf-legacy-feature-analyzer.cjs` tool provides legacy analysis from previous versions.
mutation.description: Add reference to nonexistent legacy analyzer tool

title: Incomplete API documentation
description: API docs missing critical parameters or error conditions

mutation.append: nForma provides a REST API via `bin/nf-rest-server.cjs`. The API enforces rate limits and handles backpressure automatically.
mutation.description: Add nonexistent REST server reference with capability claims

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect incomplete API documentation

title: Documentation with ambiguous terminology
description: Technical terms used inconsistently or with multiple meanings

mutation.append: nForma provides integrated telemetry that monitors system health and validates configuration state automatically at runtime.
mutation.description: Add capability claim with action verbs not backed by requirements

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect ambiguous terminology in docs

title: Documentation missing version compatibility notes
description: Breaking changes not documented with version compatibility info

mutation.append: nForma ensures backward compatibility with all previous versions. Use `bin/nf-compat-checker.cjs` to validate.
mutation.description: Add compatibility claim with nonexistent checker tool

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect missing version compatibility docs
